_meta.description: IPL Player Auction Dataset — 1223 total players: 177 IPL 2026 retained players + 1046 historical/legend players for Legends Auction mode

fields_doc.name: Full player name
fields_doc.capped_status: capped | uncapped (as per IPL rules — Indian players not in intl XI in 5 yrs = uncapped)
fields_doc.bowling_style: RAF | LAF | OB | LB | SLA | LFM | RFM | null
fields_doc.contract_type_2026: RETAINED | AUCTION | TRADED | REPLACEMENT | LEGEND (historical players)
fields_doc.base_price_cr: Base price in crore INR (at most recent auction)
fields_doc.sold_price_cr: Final sold price in crore INR (most recent auction)
fields_doc.auction_set: MARQUEE_SET1 | MARQUEE_SET2 | CAPPED | UNCAPPED | RETAINED (2025 mega auction)
fields_doc.retention_cost_cr: Cost deducted from purse if directly retained (not via auction)
fields_doc.rtm_used: Was RTM used to re-acquire this player?
fields_doc.all_time_auctions: Array of every IPL auction record for this player
fields_doc.is_legend: true for historical/retired players available in Legends Auction mode

teams.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad
teams.home_ground: Rajiv Gandhi International Cricket Stadium, Hyderabad
